Off Calendar Feb-25-2009 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-28-2009 Continued To Feb-25-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Shaun Carberry for Ophelia Bingham (Executor).

Mr. Carberry stated that the Third Amended First And Final Account was ready for filing but that was he waiting for it to be signed. The matter was continued to February 25, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Department 204.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy M. Svahlin.

MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Karen Farnsworth, CSR#5162. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Wong.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-08-2008 Continued To Oct-15-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Shaun Carberry for Ophelia Bingham (Executor).

Mr. Carberry stated that the amended first and final account was prepared and just needed his client's signature. The matter was continued to October 15, 2008. The Court informed counsel that if the accounting was filed a new date would be set and no appearance would be required on October 15, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda./R. Noguera.
